---
layout: page
title: "About me"
---

<style>
  .phd-home {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1120px;
    margin: 2rem auto 3rem;
    color: #111;
    font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
  }

  .phd-home * {
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .phd-top-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 220px minmax(0, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 4.5rem;
  }

  .phd-photo-placeholder {
    width: 220px;
    height: 260px;
    border: 1px solid #999;
    background: #f3f1eb;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: #777;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.35;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /*
    Later, replace the placeholder content with:
    <img src="/assets/images/your-photo.jpg" alt="Profile photo">
  */

  .phd-photo-placeholder img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }

  .phd-about {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 310px;
    padding: 3.2rem 2.8rem 2.8rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: center;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f1f1f1 0%, #d1d1d1 100%);
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .phd-about p {
    max-width: 760px;
    margin: 0;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 1.8vw, 1.38rem);
    line-height: 1.28;
  }

  .phd-news {
    position: relative;
    width: min(820px, 82%);
    min-height: 165px;
    margin: 9.5rem auto 0;
    padding: 1.6rem 4.5rem 1.8rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f4f4f4 0%, #d8d8d8 100%);
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .phd-news h2 {
    margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .phd-news ul {
    width: fit-content;
    max-width: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding-left: 1.4rem;
    list-style-type: square;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 1.25rem);
    line-height: 1.45;
  }

  .phd-news a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-underline-offset: 0.15em;
  }

  .phd-news a:hover {
    color: #56318e;
  }

  .phd-decor {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 2;
    display: block;
    max-width: none;
    border: 0;
    background: transparent;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .phd-knit {
    width: 105px;
    top: -72px;
    left: -8px;
  }

  .phd-books {
    width: 104px;
    top: -70px;
    right: -15px;
  }

  .phd-laptop {
    width: 145px;
    left: -28px;
    bottom: -54px;
  }

  .phd-flower {
    width: 100px;
    right: -92px;
    bottom: -8px;
  }

  .phd-pot {
    width: 120px;
    right: 35px;
    top: -78px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 820px) {
    .phd-top-row {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 5.5rem;
      margin-top: 3rem;
    }

    .phd-photo-placeholder {
      width: 180px;
      height: 220px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .phd-about {
      min-height: 390px;
      margin: 0 0.8rem;
      padding: 3.1rem 1.1rem 5.5rem;
    }

    .phd-about p {
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.42;
    }

    .phd-knit {
      width: 80px;
      left: -4px;
      top: -54px;
    }

    .phd-books {
      width: 74px;
      right: -3px;
      top: -51px;
    }

    .phd-laptop {
      width: 108px;
      left: -14px;
      bottom: -42px;
    }

    .phd-flower {
      width: 78px;
      right: 6px;
      bottom: -36px;
    }

    .phd-news {
      width: 92%;
      min-height: 180px;
      margin-top: 8rem;
      padding: 1.7rem 2.1rem 1.6rem;
      border-radius: 70px;
    }

    .phd-pot {
      width: 88px;
      right: 18px;
      top: -57px;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="phd-home">

  <div class="phd-top-row">

    <div class="phd-photo-placeholder">
      <img src="/assets/images/phd_photo.jpeg" alt="Profile photo">
    </div>

    <section class="phd-about">
      <img class="phd-decor phd-knit" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
      <img class="phd-decor phd-books" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
      <img class="phd-decor phd-laptop" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
      <img class="phd-decor phd-flower" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">

      <p>
        I hold a Master’s degree in Natural Language Processing from Université de Lorraine (IDMC)
        and I have recently started my PhD at Orange, focusing on formal semantics approaches to
        enhance conversational understanding in machines. My research interests lie at the
        intersection of computational linguistics, artificial intelligence, and language models,
        with a particular emphasis on meaning representation, formal semantics, and frugal methods
        in NLP.
      </p>
    </section>

  </div>

  <section class="phd-news">
    <img class="phd-decor phd-pot" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">

    <h2>What’s cooking?</h2>

    <ul>
      <li>
        August 2026: I will be attending
        <a href="https://2026.esslli.eu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ESSLLI 2026</a>.
      </li>
      <li>
        July 2026: I presented a poster at
        <a href="https://coria-taln-2026.ls2n.fr/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">TALN 2026</a>.
      </li>
    </ul>
  </section>

</div>
